data.title: Producer Inflation Rises More Than Expected To 3% In November: All Eyes On The Fed's Interest Rate Call
data.description: PPI rose 3% YoY in Nov, exceeding expectations & casting a shadow over the economy's disinflation. Fed rate cut still expected but with caution.

data.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In On 3 Risk Off Care Stocks With Over 5% Dividend Yields
Hacker Exploits Dogecoin Vulnerability, Crashes 69% Of Nodes—But DOGE Still Spikes 1.8%
data.description: A critical vulnerability in the Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) network has led to a significant disruption, with 69% of its nodes rendered inactive.

data.title: NYPD Warns About 'Wanted' Posters Targeting Finance Executives, And Crossed-Out UnitedHealthcare CEO (UPDATED)
data.description: The NYPD has issued a warning about threats to healthcare executives following the murder of UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson, highlighting the circulation of "Wanted" posters and rising security concerns amidst extremist reactions online.

data.title: Chainlink Price Soars 22% On President-Elect Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial Purchases: How High Can LINK Go?
data.description: Chainlink (CRYPTO: LINK) soared 22% in 24 hours, bringing its month-over-month performance to 93% as fundamental developments point to a bullish future.
